html:
Exclusive to:

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

GenericActiveBrewingBurnt

“Pearl's very own tea shop to provide you with riveting teas.”

-

Pearl's Tea Shop is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 25 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 15 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area. When a player is near the Tea Shop, the Crabby Hermit will enter the shop, allowing the player to make Pearl's Tea.

The amount of ingredients required to make Pearl's Tea decreases as the decoration score increases. When the score is above 50 points, Pearl's Tea requires two fewer dried ingredients. When the score is above 75 points, it requires an additional two fewer dried ingredients.

Crafting Recipes

  • Petal Tea
  • Dark Petal Tea
  • Foliage Tea
  • Succulent Tea
  • Lune Tree Blossom Tea
  • Fire Nettle Tea
  • Tillweed Tea
  • Forget-Me-Lots Tea

Abandoned Tea Shop

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Pearl's Tea Shop at the original location will become an Abandoned Tea Shop and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Tea Shop will remain abandoned and cannot be used.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
Event
The Merrymaker Collection

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
GenericActiveBrewingBurnt
“The shop is emp-tea.”
–Wilson
“Where's Pearl?”
–Willow
“Where sweet crab lady?”
–Wolfgang
“She's not in.”
–Wendy
“WHERE IS SHE NOW?”
–WX-78
“I do hope she's in soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“She's not in, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Where is that Pearl?”
–Maxwell
“The sea witch hath abandöned her pöst!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, Ms. Peeeaarl! Where are you?”
–Webber
“The shop is empty.”
–Warly
“Where crabby friend?”
–Wormwood
“Pearl ain't in yet.”
–Winona
“Oh dear, she's not here!”
–Wortox
“Where crabby lady?”
–Wurt
“That's right, Woby. She's not in yet.”
–Walter
“I hope Pearl is in soon.”
–Wanda
“Tea time!”
–Wilson
“Tea me, Pearl!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang love tea!”
–Wolfgang
“It's been a while since my last tea party.”
–Wendy
“REHYDRATING SOMETHING THAT IS DEHYDRATED. REDUNDANT”
–WX-78
“There is nothing quite like a good cup of tea.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pearl makes a good cup of tea.”
–Woodie
“I can never decide what I want.”
–Maxwell
“What cöncöctiön dö I fancy?”
–Wigfrid
“We love Ms. Pearl's tea!”
–Webber
“Madame Pearl makes a delightful cup of tea.”
–Warly
“Like crabby friend tea!”
–Wormwood
“I sure am cravin' a cup of Pearl's tea!”
–Winona
“A tea to first quench my thirst!”
–Wortox
“Me thirsty!”
–Wurt
“Ms. Pearl makes the best tea!”
–Walter
“It is time for tea.”
–Wanda
“I paid a steep price.”
–Wilson
“This is taking forever!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is getting thirsty!”
–Wolfgang
“One of my few joys in this life.”
–Wendy
“BETTER BE GOOD”
–WX-78
“I'm happy to support a small business.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's worth the wait.”
–Woodie
“Where's my tea?”
–Maxwell
“The sea witch is brewing her cöncöctiön.”
–Wigfrid
“We want our tea! We want our tea!”
–Webber
“Madame Pearl's tea is just what I need.”
–Warly
“Thirsty time”
–Wormwood
“I can smell it brewin'.”
–Winona
“Nothing to do, but wait for the brew!”
–Wortox
“Hurry, crabby lady!”
–Wurt
“I can't wait for my tea!”
–Walter
“One must take their time brewing tea.”
–Wanda
“Her shop is toast.”
–Wilson
“Don't look at me!”
–Willow
“This not good.”
–Wolfgang
“It makes me extra sad.”
–Wendy
“HAHA... WHERE DO I GET TEA NOW?”
–WX-78
“How awful.”
–Wickerbottom
“Oh, Pearl. I'm so sorry.”
–Woodie
“I don't suppose she had insurance.”
–Maxwell
“Methinks Ödin craved the witch's brew.”
–Wigfrid
“Poor Ms. Pearl!”
–Webber
“Oh non! Madame's tea shop!”
–Warly
“Bad fire!”
–Wormwood
“Aw crap.”
–Winona
“My head was turned and the shop was burned!”
–Wortox
“No! Florp.”
–Wurt
“I hope Ms. Pearl is okay.”
–Walter
“A shame. I should have seen it coming.”
–Wanda
“Pearl's very own tea shop to provide you with riveting teas.”
-
